---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
fname <- "data/fsvdb_v4/faiss_indexes/st_mt-sap-bert_disease.index"

# Example for a comma-separated .index file
data <- read.csv(fname, header = TRUE) 

# Example for a tab-separated .index file
data <- read.delim(fname, header = TRUE) 

# Example for a more generic text file, adjusting parameters as needed
data <- read.table(fname, sep = " ", header = FALSE) 
```
